'''''The Official Star Wars Fact File'' 33''' was the thirty-third issue of ''[[The Official Star Wars Fact File]]'', released on [[August 14]], [[2002]].

{{Magazine-stub|issue}}

==Contents==
*[[Battle of Hoth/Legends|Escape of the Rebels]]
*The [[Emperor's Royal Guard/Legends|Emperor's Royal Guard]]
*[[R2-D2/Legends|R2-D2]] (Artoo-Detoo)
*[[Mos Eisley/Legends|Mos Eisley]] Cantina Characters
*[[Tatooine/Legends|Tatooine]] - [[Mos Eisley/Legends|Mos Eisley]]
*[[Battle droid/Legends|Military Droids]]
*[[Obi-Wan Kenobi/Legends|Obi-Wan Kenobi's]] [[Lightsaber/Legends|Lightsaber]]
*[[Consular-class light cruiser/Legends|Republic Cruiser]]
